scripts.build:macos: npm run bundle:plugin && npm run version:check && tauri build --bundles app,dmg --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.build:windows: npm run bundle:plugin && npm run version:check && tauri build --bundles nsis --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.check: npm run bundle:plugin && npm run bundle:plugin:verify && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run project:verify && npm run version:check && npm run cargo:fmt && npm run cargo:clippy
scripts.format: prettier --write src tests ../scripts/assemble-local-release.mjs ../scripts/build-plugin-bundle.mjs ../scripts/check-versions.mjs ../scripts/merge-signing-evidence.mjs ../scripts/prepare-release-handoff.mjs ../scripts/run-local-ci.mjs ../scripts/verify-pe-authenticode.mjs ../scripts/verify-pe-machine.mjs ../scripts/verify-plugin-bundle.mjs ../scripts/verify-project.mjs ../scripts/verify-release-artifacts.mjs ../scripts/write-release-tauri-config.mjs ../scripts/lib ../docs/INSTALLER-ARCHITECTURE.md ../docs/INSTALLER-DEVELOPMENT.md ../docs/INSTALLER-RELEASE.md ../README.md package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src tests ../scripts/assemble-local-release.mjs ../scripts/build-plugin-bundle.mjs ../scripts/check-versions.mjs ../scripts/merge-signing-evidence.mjs ../scripts/prepare-release-handoff.mjs ../scripts/run-local-ci.mjs ../scripts/verify-pe-authenticode.mjs ../scripts/verify-pe-machine.mjs ../scripts/verify-plugin-bundle.mjs ../scripts/verify-project.mjs ../scripts/verify-release-artifacts.mjs ../scripts/write-release-tauri-config.mjs ../scripts/lib ../docs/INSTALLER-ARCHITECTURE.md ../docs/INSTALLER-DEVELOPMENT.md ../docs/INSTALLER-RELEASE.md ../README.md package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run bundle:plugin && npm run version:check && tauri dev
scripts.test: npm run bundle:plugin && npm run test:node && npm run test:rust
